title: Spotlight this week: Supreme Court Justice Joymalya Bagchi
description: Spotlight is a series where we shine the, well, spotlight on members of the legal fraternity that made the news over the past week.This week, the spotlight is on Supreme Court Justice Joymalya Bagchi, who found himself in the most curious of positions: judging a hearing that was highly critical of his hometown and people.A "son of the soil" from the Calcutta High Court, Justice Bagchi now sits on a Supreme Court Bench that has spent the last week dissecting the political and social fabric o
